subject: [PATCH v8 06/15] mm: add MM_CP_UFFD_RWP change_protection() flag

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch adds two new flags to the change_protection() function in the Linux kernel: MM_CP_UFFD_RWP and MM_CP_UFFD_RWP_RESOLVE. These flags are used by userfaultfd RWP (Read-Write Protection) to install and restore protection on pages. The MM_CP_UFFD_RWP flag sets a page as read-only with the uffd bit set, while the MM_CP_UFFD_RWP_RESOLVE flag restores the original protection of a page and clears the uffd bit. The patch also updates various kernel functions to handle these new flags correctly.
